content.en:
As time passed, more and more peak realm gods gathered in the Tianyang family.

this day.

A half-step transcendent realm of the Tianyang family appeared, he was the third half-step superdimensional realm powerhouse of the Tianyang family-cation, cation is a very terrifying half-step extradimensional realm, but because he had transformed his physical body and affected the foundation, he could not break through to the superdimensional realm.

Otherwise, he would have broken through to the extradimensional realm long ago.

Many half-step super-dimensional realms have transformed their physical bodies and fused the bloodlines of super-dimensional creatures, although they will regret it in the later stage, but if they have not fused the bloodlines of super-dimensional creatures, they may not be able to comprehend the power of super-dimensional and break through to the half-step super-dimensional realm, thus dying in the case of super-dimensional assimilation.

So, there are gains and losses.

"Everyone, next I will take you to a treasure place in the Death Void, the rules have been told to you, as long as you gather ten Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, you can take all the resources. Otherwise, only a tenth of the resources can be taken away. In addition, you have limited time, and it is impossible for our Tianyang Family to let you stay in that treasure place all the time. If it's more than one percent of the extradimensional era, you haven't come out yet. Then, if you come out beyond the time, all the resources will be deducted, and you will not be allowed to take it away at all. Next, you can hide your treasures and not bring them into that treasure place, otherwise we will think that you have brought them from that treasure land. If you want to bring in some super secret treasures and special treasures, you can take them out in advance and register. "

Cation said.

The peak realm gods present had known about this rule for a long time, so they didn't ~ have the resources to carry.

Ye Tian's replica body did not carry any treasures, not even the fragments of the super dimensional dao soldiers, but only some super dimensional secret treasures.

Therefore, many peak realm gods registered the weapons on their bodies, and followed the cation to board the Tianyang Treasure Ship of the Tianyang Family and entered the Death-Void.

......

The Death Void of the Six Thousand Territory was extremely dangerous, and even the Tianyang Treasure Ship flew cautiously and walked along a safe route.

But the safe route is not necessarily safe, and those extradimensional creatures sometimes migrate and move, and once they collide, it is easy to break out into conflict.

But.

The means that the Tianyang family also wants to explore, some situations can be avoided in advance, but if it is the kind of extradimensional creature that is good at concealment, it can only be unlucky.

Of course.

Unless they're too unlucky, there's hardly any big danger.

It didn't take long.

The Tianyang Treasure Ship encountered a group of migrating extra-dimensional creatures, among which there were several half-step extra-dimensional creatures in the transcendent realm, and the others were all at the peak realm god level.

This group of extradimensional creatures sensed the Tianyang Treasure Ship and immediately rushed over.

"Start the Sky Aurora!"

Cations commanded.

"Yes!"

The pinnacle realm gods of the Tianyang family responded, and immediately urged the killer weapon on the Tianyang Treasure ship, the Tianyang Aurora.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying light emanated from the Tianyang Treasure Ship, swept away with terrifying power.

In an instant, the group of extra-dimensional creatures was hit by the Tianyang Aurora, which caused a surge, and the terrifying light engulfed that area, and the super-dimensional creatures at the peak realm god level were directly melted, and the few half-step super-dimensional creatures of the super-dimensional realm relied on their powerful bodies to carry them, but they were also hit hard.

Instantly, they quickly fled.

Cations didn't go after it, it was extremely dangerous to chase it in the Death Void, even if it was a powerful half-step extradimensional realm, they didn't dare to chase it, in case they encountered a superdimensional creature in the extradimensional realm, they could kill him in a breath.

The Tianyang Treasure Ship still flies according to the original route.

......

"What a horrible attack!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

I didn't expect that the Tianyang Treasure Ship could severely damage a few half-step extradimensional creatures in the realm of transcendence, if those extradimensional creatures did not escape, if a few more shots, they would definitely die.

"I wonder if such a treasure ship has to be sold?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If there is a sale, he really wants to buy one.

However, he also knew very well that such a treasure ship was definitely very expensive, and he probably couldn't afford it.

On the next journey, the Tianyang Treasure Ship encountered some minor troubles in the Death Void, but it did not affect the itinerary of the Tianyang Treasure Ship.

0 begging for flowers

After some time, the Tianyang Treasure Ship finally arrived at the treasure land.

Near this treasure land, many extra-dimensional fortresses and a large number of formations shrouded it, which shows the importance that the Tianyang family attaches to this treasure land.

"At least there are at least nine half-step extradimensional realms guarding here!"

Ye Tian said darkly. []

Now it seems that there are many half-step transcendent realms of the Tianyang family.

It stands to reason that as long as the foundation is fine, the half-step transcendental realm can break through to the extradimensional realm, but it is just a matter of time.

But these half-step transcendent realms should all have foundation problems, and they all seem to have transformed their physical bodies at the peak realm god level.

"If I'm not mistaken, the Tianyang family should have mastered a transformation method that can greatly increase the probability of comprehending the power of the superdimension, although there is no way to break through to the superdimensional realm after the transformation, but the hope of comprehending the superdimensional power has greatly increased, and it can impact the half-step superdimensional realm. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, a true demonic genius must definitely not allow the cultivation of this kind of transformation method, once cultivated, the future can only be limited to a half-step transcendent realm.

But for those peak realm gods who had no hope of breaking through, this method of transformation was very powerful, and it was definitely the foundation of an extradimensional force.

"Although the blood body transformation method I obtained can also improve the probability of comprehending the power of the superdimension, the improvement is very small, and it is estimated that it is far inferior to the transformation method mastered by the Tianyang family, if there is a chance in the future, I have to find a way to obtain this transformation method. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Come down!"

Cation tracts.

Many pinnacle realm gods came down and stood densely outside an extradimensional fortress.

After the second inspection, these pinnacle realm gods were allowed to enter this treasure land.

After these peak realm gods entered, several half-step transcendent realms such as cations gathered together.

"I don't know how many Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruins Grass these peak realm gods can bring out, if the quantity is not enough, the ancestor is afraid that he will not be able to recover, and he will not even be able to hold on!" Cationic said in a deep voice.

"We are also buying the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, but some hostile forces are also acquiring it, obviously not letting us get together the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruins Grass, if the Ancestor falls, the strength of our Tianyang Family will be reduced by at least half. "Another half-step extradimensional realm is secretly enlightened.
